mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND date = #{date} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND date >= #{startDate} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT date FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY date DESC
